Com esta extensão, você será capaz de criar atalhos de maneira acessível para focar elementos em uma página web, além de utilizar…

Com esta extensão, você será capaz de criar atalhos de maneira acessível para focar elementos em uma página web, além de utilizar inteligência artificial para descrever imagens, gerar resumos inteligentes do conteúdo das páginas e tirar dúvidas em tempo real através de um chat interativo.
IMPORTANTE SOBRE A INTELIGÊNCIA ARTIFICIAL: Para utilizar os recursos de IA (Resumos, Descrição de Imagens e Chat), a extensão utiliza o modelo "Traga sua Própria Chave" (BYOK). Isso significa que você poderá inserir sua própria chave de API gratuita do Gemini (gerada facilmente no Google AI Studio). Essa abordagem garante que você tenha sua própria cota de uso exclusiva, sem anúncios, sem limites compartilhados e com total privacidade de dados.
MENU DE ATALHOS ACESSÍVEIS:
Agora, a extensão conta com um menu dedicado chamado "Atalhos Acessíveis", que pode ser acessado clicando com o botão direito do mouse em qualquer lugar da página ou utilizando a tecla "Aplicações" (ou Shift + F10) do seu teclado. Dentro deste menu, você encontrará todas as funcionalidades principais e os atalhos padrão da extensão, o que melhora significativamente o acesso rápido às opções sem a necessidade de memorizar todas as combinações de teclas imediatamente.
ADICIONAR UM NOVO ATALHO:
Basta utilizar o atalho de adição de atalho. Um som será reproduzido e você poderá navegar com Tab ou Shift + Tab para focar um elemento na página e então pressionar a combinação de teclas que será o atalho para o elemento em foco.
Por padrão, o atalho para adicionar um novo atalho é o "Alt + Control + Shift + A" no Windows e "Command + Option + Shift + A" no Mac.
Após executar esse atalho, escolha o elemento navegando com Tab ou Shift + Tab e depois faça a combinação desejada para o elemento em foco. Uma caixa de confirmação será exibida: ative o botão "Ok" para confirmar ou "Cancelar" para que o atalho não seja criado.
RESUMO DA PÁGINA COM IA:
Para obter um resumo inteligente da página atual, utilize o atalho "Alt + Control + Shift + R" no Windows e "Command + Option + Shift + R" no Mac.
A extensão analisará o conteúdo e exibirá um resumo. O resumo é interativo: se houver um formulário ou botão importante, o link no resumo terá o sufixo "(focar na página)" e, ao ser ativado, levará o foco do leitor de telas direto para o elemento. Se for um link externo, ele indicará "(abrirá em nova aba)". Você também encontrará o botão "Gerar novo resumo" caso queira atualizar as informações.
DESCREVER UMA IMAGEM:
Para descrever uma imagem, utilize o atalho "Alt + Control + Shift + D" no Windows e "Command + Option + Shift + D" no Mac. Selecione uma imagem no seu computador e ative o botão "Descrever imagem". Também é possível utilizar o botão "Descrever imagem da área de transferência" para obter a descrição de um print ou imagem copiada (por exemplo, do WhatsApp Web).
CHAT COM A IA:
Após gerar um resumo ou descrever uma imagem, você pode tirar dúvidas específicas sobre o conteúdo. No final da janela de resumo ou da descrição de imagens, haverá um campo de edição para "Perguntar algo sobre a página ou sobre a imagem". Escreva sua dúvida e pressione Enter ou ative o botão "Perguntar". A resposta da IA aparecerá logo abaixo da sua pergunta e será lida automaticamente pelo seu leitor de telas. Você pode continuar a conversa enquanto o modal estiver aberto.
PÁGINA DE CONFIGURAÇÕES:
O atalho padrão para acessar as configurações é "Alt + Control + Shift + C" no Windows e "Command + Option + Shift + C" no Mac. Lá você poderá verificar e gerenciar todos os atalhos criados, gerenciar os padrões e configurar sua Chave API do Gemini.
Na página há um passo a passo simples e acessível indicando como acessar o Google AI Studio, copiar sua chave de acesso gratuita e salvá-la na extensão de forma segura.
GERENCIANDO ATALHOS:
  
Atalhos criados: Na tabela sob o título "Atalhos criados", você pode conferir suas combinações e ativar o botão "Excluir" na coluna "Ação" para remover um atalho.
  
Atalhos padrão: Sob o título "Atalhos padrão", você pode editar as combinações da própria extensão (como o atalho de resumo ou o de adicionar novos itens). Ao ativar "Editar", um som soará e você deverá pressionar a nova combinação desejada. Uma caixa de confirmação será exibida antes da nova combinação de teclas ser registrada.
EXPORTAR E IMPORTAR ATALHOS:
Você pode salvar seus atalhos personalizados para usar em outro navegador ou fazer um backup de segurança. Na página de configurações:
  
Exportar atalhos: Ative o botão "Exportar atalhos" para baixar um arquivo com extensão ".as" contendo todas as suas combinações criadas.
  
Importar e acrescentar atalhos: Ative este botão para selecionar um arquivo de atalhos com extensão ".as" previamente salvo. A extensão irá adicionar os novos atalhos à sua lista atual, sem apagar os que você já tem.
OUTRAS INFORMAÇÕES:
Se inscreva no canal @ContinueDesenvolvendo no YouTube:
https://youtube.com/continuedesenvolvendo
E acesse o site oficial para atualizações:
https://julianolopes.com.br/extensao-atalhos-acessiveis

Save, edit, search, and download ChatGPT conversations locally in Markdown.

# storageGPT

storageGPT helps you keep useful ChatGPT conversations organized without sending your saved data to any external server.

## Key Features

Save conversations: Save ChatGPT responses directly from the conversation screen and keep them in your local browser storage.

Markdown download: Download saved conversations as Markdown files, one by one or in bulk.

Editable notes: Open a saved conversation in the drawer and edit both the title and the body. The body editor is powered by Milkdown, so Markdown content stays easy to read and update.

Fast drawer access: Use `Control + Shift + X` to open the storage drawer quickly.

Search and trash management: Search saved titles, restore deleted notes, or permanently clean up the trash.

Theme-aware UI: The extension follows ChatGPT light and dark modes for a more natural experience.

Local-first privacy: Saved conversations stay on your device. storageGPT does not transmit your saved data to a server.

## Recent Updates

Improved saving reliability when ChatGPT changes its UI.

Added editable saved note bodies with Milkdown.

Improved drawer layout, fixed click handling, and reduced CSS conflicts through Shadow DOM encapsulation.

Improved light mode support and visual styling.

Improved title editing so browser undo works more naturally.

storageGPT makes it easier to save, edit, search, and export the ChatGPT conversations you want to keep.

Copy and paste to the value property of the target element

"Copy paste value" is an extension that copies and pastes the ".value" property of the target element to the clipboard.
You can use it instead of running commands like "copy ($ 0.value)" or "$ 0.value =` text` "in the DevTools console.

# Features

* You can also set a value for an input form that blocks the onPaste event.
* You can copy the value of select box or radio button.
* You can copy the auto-completed password.
* Since the UI is added only to the context menu, it does not interfere with normal operations.

see https://github.com/kyo-ago/copy-paste-value

Instant random seating charts that follow your rules

Shuffle Buddy is a randomized seating chart generator that makes it effortless to randomize seats for your students in just one click. And since truly random seats don't always work, Shuffle Buddy also allows you to specify seating rules that will always be respected.

Get the all the benefits of randomized seats with none of the hassle.

---

Why random seating?
Randomized seating is amazing. When students interact with all of their peers, they form stronger relationships with people similar and different from themselves. Frequent seat changes reduce classroom disruptions. Doing it randomly reduces real and perceived bias.

But be careful!
You can't just put anybody anywhere. Jessica has an IEP; she needs to sit near the front. Justin benefits from a productive peer. And we learned that hard way that Xavier and Lewis work better apart.

That's where Shuffle Buddy shines: Instant random seating charts that follow YOUR rules.
Bring "paste and go" functionality to everywhere in the browser

Just like the "Paste and Go" functionality on the browser address bar, but extended to input fields in any website.

Right click and select, or press Ctrl (command) + alt (option) + V to paste and go.

Please note that you have to give clipboard permission the first time you use paste and go on each page. This is to required by the browser.
Aims to categorize code review comments in a way that communicates the intent, urgency, and required action effectively.

Enhance your code review process on Bitbucket with the Bitbucket Conventional Comments Helper Chrome extension. This tool helps developers provide clear, structured, and meaningful feedback on Pull Requests using a set of predefined comment categories. Streamline your reviews, foster collaboration, and maintain high-quality code by categorizing feedback effectively during the review process.

✨ Features

● Praise: Provide positive feedback on well-written, clean, or creative solutions to encourage best practices and team motivation.

● Question: Ask for clarification or further explanations about specific code sections to ensure understanding or highlight uncertainties.

● Suggestion: Offer actionable suggestions for improvements or optimizations that can enhance the codebase.

● Issue: Issues highlight specific problems with the subject under review. These problems can be user-facing or behind the scenes.

● Nitpick: Point out minor issues, inconsistencies, or small fixes that won't break functionality but help maintain clean and consistent code.

● Chore: Comment on non-functional tasks, maintenance, or minor updates that don't affect core functionality but are necessary for project upkeep.

● Thought: Share high-level reflections, insights, or design considerations about the code, architecture, or implementation.

● Todo: Small, trivial, but necessary changes. It helps direct the reader’s attention to comments requiring more involvement.

● Note: Notes are always non-blocking and simply highlight something the reader should take note of.

● Polish: Polish comments are like a suggestion, where there is nothing necessarily wrong with the relevant content, there’s just some ways to immediately improve the quality.

● Quibble: Quibbles comments are like a minor complaint or criticism or objection, often considered petty or trivial. It can refer to small issue or disagreement that is not significant enough to a major concern, but still worth mentioning.

● Decorator(Blocking/Non-Blocking): A comment with this decoration should or shouldn't prevent the subject under review from being accepted.

To learn more about Conventional comments: https://conventionalcomments.org/

✨ Key Benefits

● Bitbucket Integration: Fully integrated with Bitbucket, making it easy to leave structured comments directly on pull requests within your Bitbucket repositories.

● Organize Feedback: Categorize your comments for easier reference and follow-up, ensuring that feedback is always actionable and clear.

● Improved Collaboration: Foster open communication and enhance teamwork by using a structured approach to code reviews.

● Inline Comment Shortcuts: Quick access to 'praise', 'nitpick', suggestion, 'question', 'thought', and more.

● Integrated Tooltips: Each comment type comes with a clarification of its correct usage.


Streamline your Bitbucket code reviews, improve collaboration, and make feedback more actionable with the Bitbucket Conventional Comments Helper. Try it today to elevate your code review process!

RiseVerse Library: Prevent class duplication in Webflow
RiseVerse Library, a Chrome Extension to prevent class duplication in Webflow and improve your development workflow.

Improve your Webflow workflow with the RiseVerse Library Chrome Extension.

Tired of duplicated classes cluttering your Webflow projects? Say goodbye to class duplication with RiseVerseSync! 🚀

Our free, high-performance Chrome Extension prevents class duplication when you copy and paste elements from the RiseVerse Library or between projects. Keep your workflow smooth and focus on what you do best—building remarkable websites.

Key Benefits:

- ⏰ Save time : No more manual cleanup of duplicate classes.
- 📂 Stay organized : Maintain consistent class names across all your projects.
- ⚡ Boost efficiency : Optimized for best performance without slowing you down.
- 😍  Enjoy the process : Focus on what you do the best.
- 🆓 Completely free : Enjoy all features at no cost.

How to use RiseVerseSync:

- Clone Style Guides: Add our Light Mode or Dark Mode Style Guide to your Webflow project.
- Install the Extension: Add RiseVerseSync to your Chrome browser.
- Activate It: Click the icon in your toolbar to turn it on.
- Copy Elements: Copy components from our Component Library or any Webflow projects.
- Paste Seamlessly: Paste into another project without creating duplicate classes.

Style Guides:

☀️ Light Mod by default  ➜ webflow.com/made-in-webflow/website/riseverse-light-mode-style-guide
🌑 Dark Mode by default  ➜ webflow.com/made-in-webflow/website/riseverse-dark-mode-style-guide

It's that simple!

At RiseVerse, we empower designers to build remarkable sites. Our mission is to inspire and help designers, developers, and agencies focus on what you do best—building remarkable websites.

Simplify your Webflow workflow and keep your projects organized. Try RiseVerseSync Today!

⚠️ Our extension, RiseVerse, was inspired by xSync by Virat. While we initially recommended it for its great functionality, we ran into some internal edge cases that led us to create our own. Huge thanks to Virat for the original work that helped shape this project.

👉 Learn more at riseverse.com/library

📢 Follow us on Twitter: @RiseVerseLib
Surf the web, dictate, and much more with just your voice

Web Assist is your gateway to a brand new browsing experience. With just your voice, you can easily navigate the web, interact with web pages, dictate messages, and perform a wide range of tasks without using your hands. Web Assist includes dozens of voice commands that replace the need to use the mouse or keyboard. 

Key Features

Effortless Browsing: Scroll through web pages, play videos, click on elements such as links, and much more using simple voice commands. To provide additional flexibility, there are several shortcut keys that you can use in place of the most commonly used voice commands. 

Explore the Web:  Search the web with Google, open websites, go back and forth between tabs, and bookmark your favorite sites. 

Voice-Controlled Dictation:  Dictate emails, fill out forms, and more.  Other related features include automatic text formatting. 

Apps Included:  Dictate using the text editor app. Create, play, and save audio recordings from your microphone with the voice/audio recorder app. 

Premium Features:  Upgrade to Web Assist Premium to create custom shortcut commands to open pages that you visit regularly, save custom template commands to input commonly used text snippets into any input field, control recognition when the page loads, start recognition with your voice, and change the timeout setting. 

Excellent Performance: Uses the browser’s fast, reliable, and accurate speech to text technology. Also has support for the Edge browser.

Privacy is Paramount:  Have confidence that your privacy is our top priority. No audio, transcripts, or other data is ever sent to our servers. Your personal information and activities remain yours. 

Benefits

Increased Productivity: Save time and boost productivity by using your voice to dictate and navigate the web without touching the keyboard. 

No Cost to Use Basic Features:  Web Assist is free to download and offers many features to get you started on your voice-powered experience.  

Free Voice-Controlled Dictation: Unlike other options on the market, our basic free package includes full access to voice-controlled dictation features. 

Enhanced Accessibility: Web Assist has been designed to empower those with physical challenges by providing a speech recognition solution that makes browsing the web simple and fast. 

Ready to get started? 

Explore a new approach to browsing the web with Web Assist.  Download it for free and start enjoying the power of voice controlled web surfing today.  Whether you're looking to save time, enhance accessibility, or try something new, Web Assist is here to make your online experience smoother and more enjoyable. You can try out our demos starting here: https://webassistextension.com/tabs.html.

This add-on use  regular expression templates to filter a text when it is pasted or copied.
You may paste & filter when you paste a text modified by a regular expression in a form field in the browser. 
You may copy & filter to copy some text from a web page and want to use it modified by a regular expression in another application.
You may also apply a regular expression modifier to change a text already in the clipcoard. The changed text being kept in the clipboard so that it can be pasted in the address bar for example.

Example 1: Suppose I want to filter only words that are longer then four characters to use in search engine:
Open the Skim the clipboard option page click on Add a row (check box field) and enter the following in the table: 

- set name: >4, 
- set regular expression template: [\w\u00c0-\u010f]{4,}
- Regular expression modifier: gi
- set keep match or substitute: checked
- Keep in clipboard: unchecked
- Shortcut: two

Click on Save all and close the option page.

Close the options, and select and copy a text from the web page you want to search, click in the search engine field, right click and select 
Paste  filtered - >4. Only the words of four charaters or more are paste in the field.
You may also  simply press Ctrl+Shift+B (PC) / Command+Shift+B (Mac) in the form field to paste the modified clipboard content.

Example 2: Suppose I want to paste the host url address (https://dev.opera.com/) in the address bar, using any link location from this site, eg. (https://dev.opera.com/extensions/publishing-guidelines/#create).

Open the Skim the clipboard option page, click on Add a row (text field) and enter the following in the table: 

- set name: host, 
- set regular expression template: (^http.?:\/\/[^\/]+)(.*$)
- Regular expression modifier: gi
- set keep match or substitute: $1
- Keep in clipboard: checked
- Shortcut: one

Click on Save all and close the option page.
Copy a page url from the address bar or on the context menu Copy link Address. Click on the page and right click on Replace in Clipboard > Host. The clipboard content is changed to the host url.Click in the address bar and (regular) paste the modified url that you can paste in the address bar.
You may also  simply press Ctrl+Shift+A (PC) Command+Shift+A (Mac) in the web page to modify the clipboard content.
给 Instagram Direct 列表上的好友自动发消息，发送间隔可设置为随机时间，支持设置从第几个好友开始发。
Instagram Direct Auto Sender 插件可以自动打开Instagram的Direct消息页面，并自动将指定的消息发送给列表中的用户，支持用户指定从列表中的哪个用户开始发送消息，每个消息的间隔时间为6到30秒的随机时间。
Download Pinterest videos easily with one click via Klickpin

KlickPin – Pinterest Downloader is a powerful Chrome extension that makes saving content from Pinterest simple and fast. With just one click, you can automatically copy any Pinterest link and instantly open it on klickpin.app to start downloading. This extension works as a reliable Pinterest video Downloader, allowing you to grab videos, images, and pins directly to your device. Whether you want to save video Pinterest for offline viewing, keep collections for inspiration, or share content with friends, KlickPin provides a seamless experience. Designed to be lightweight and user-friendly, this Pinterest Downloader automates the process: click the download button, copy the link, and let KlickPin handle the rest. No complicated steps, no unnecessary permissions – just an efficient tool to download video Pinterest quickly and safely. If you are looking for the easiest way to manage your pins and media, KlickPin is the all-in-one solution that turns Pinterest into your personal media library.
Manage your clipboard history with Copycat!

Copycat saves your clipboard history so you can paste it later!

Search and filter your clipboard history securely, all stored in your browser's local storage
Nettoie le HTML à la copie ou au collage selon des domaines configurables.

Clean HTML Copy and Paste V3 ! Reprenez le contrôle de vos copier-coller !

Fatigué de copier du texte depuis une page web pour le coller dans votre éditeur (WordPress, Gmail, un autre CMS...) et de vous retrouver avec une mise en page cassée ? C'est à cause du code HTML rempli d'attributs inutiles (style, class,  etc.) qui est copié en arrière-plan.

"Clean HTML Copy and Paste" est l'outil ultime qui résout ce problème en nettoyant le code HTML pour vous, de manière intelligente et configurable.

Comment l'utiliser ?

1. Cliquez sur l'icône de l'extension dans votre barre d'outils pour ouvrir le popup.
2. Pour un site depuis lequel vous copiez souvent, ajoutez son domaine dans la première section.
3. Pour un site où vous collez souvent, ajoutez son domaine dans la seconde section.

Vie privée & transparence

Votre vie privée est notre priorité. L'extension fonctionne entièrement sur votre machine.
* Vos listes de domaines sont stockées localement et synchronisées sur votre compte Chrome, et ne sont jamais envoyées ailleurs.

* La permission clipboardRead (lecture du presse-papiers) est requise pour le bon fonctionnement du mode "Nettoyage à la Copie".
Displays clickable timestamps from YouTube and Twitch

VodTS is a browser extension that displays clickable timestamps for YouTube and Twitch.
It allows you to easily navigate and share specific moments in videos by clicking on timestamps.

On YouTube timestamps are loaded from the video's comments, or from the user's clipboard.
On Twitch timestamps can only be added from the user's clipboard.

The extension can also be used to create a timestamp for videos or live streams.

- Right click on a timestamp in the popup to edit the timestamp.
- Keyboard shortcuts support (set in chrome extensions settings)
- Show Timestamp as Marker on the video player (can be disabled in settings)
- Display all timestamps or only VodTS timestamps (configurable in settings)
- VodTS format allow to mark chapters, sub-chapters and misc timestamps
